item.title: First Pride Month as my real self. Finally have the courage to be me.
item.description: I know, the "Selfie Rule". But just felt the need to share. Loving all the Pride posts going around.
item.dc:creator: MilesOfWhyles

item.title: What is like working for a micromanager. Send help
item.dc:creator: FridaMercury

item.title: The 442nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2024 ep 2
item.description:
IT'S TRANS TUESDAY!
FREE DAD LOVE
I'm pretty sure I got this from @abbiistabbii
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
HAPPY PRIDE MONTH! IT'S TRANS TUESDAY!
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: Images of Note: My husband is a child murderer!
item.description:
Oh hell yeah
Yay!
A desire not to see ads is valid.
Ok this might be the gayest image in the dump.
This.
Eat shit and live is a good motto tbh
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREEEEEEEEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Stay Yaypilled.

item.dc:creator: Heezeer

item.title: A pose a day: Digitigrade/Unguligrade Legs
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. THIS image is just one of a 163 image premium pose pack that I had to get out ASAP due to popular demand. So far creature artists, character design artists, and furry artists have been thrilled to have this pack! I just released it yesterday, so if you want it, you can grab it here: https://ko-fi.com/s/c1df836b7a June is Pride month, so for the month of June I'm going to be leaving this lil blurb at the end of my posts. I am trying to raise money for three great LGBTQ+ causes and you can help! Packs are $5+ (you can tip more and add more to the goal!) and you get 187 poses to work with in exchange. :) Please take a look and grab one if you can! https://ko-fi.com/s/b8b57a8648 Hope this pose helps you! Happy drawing! #Art #AdorkaStock #Reference #Artist User tags: @HaikuSorrow @Brestaris @The9mm @Veraatje01 @thegraphiteknight @CanOnlySayYes @SmolTenk @5GFPLaqZ4nAy2QwrqOEI @Nautas @LadyAzzura @Noooooozzzzzzzz @BeanTootsAreBest @pumpkinknight @sniggly5212 @TheMemeForge @lgwingnut @Talon83 @KootchieKoo @roeliebobs @TheDizzyToast @pangalgargblast @IndianCowboy @cojamist @BobbyBobbston @BenderRodriguz1010 @Netcat @ScurvyMI @BrutalAnalSeepage @AlmostPerfectComment @CouldntCakeLess @Hedgehoglet @iDrawStuff @PprHrt @Genuphobatastic @brandopolaf @TorisArt @Wormwoodworms @HikariShade @Like2Fox @ICGer @whitegirlcanteven @demoncatmara @zeroyoungxray
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: I feel this pain
item.description: Having lost my mom not too long I feel his pain. I'm not close to my family at all. Mom raised us to be so independent and distant, me and my siblings don't even get along. Now at my loneliest moments I don't have her anymore to make me feel better.
item.dc:creator: ILBaztardo
